view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case and prior step evidence.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for fixed-duration appointments is satisfied as evidenced by the linked use case and prior step evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for fixed-duration appointments, specifically 50-minute slots, as described in the linked use case. The scenario outlines that clients can see available 50-minute slots and book them, confirming the functionality of fixed-duration appointments. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that a customer successfully booked an appointment with a confirmed duration, further supporting that the requirement is fully covered without any gaps.
